name: ENVIOS Y MAS DALLAS , TX
description_short: Envios.com is an online money transfer service specializing in international remittances to Latin America and the Philippines with fast processing and competitive exchange rates.
description_long:
Envios.com is an authorized money transmitter (NMLS ID #938353) operated by Kwik Dollar LLC, based in Houston, Texas with a Dallas presence. The company positions itself as a digital-first remittance platform targeting Spanish-speaking immigrants sending money to family in their home countries.

The service enables customers to send USD from the United States to 20+ countries including Mexico, Guatemala, Honduras, El Salvador, Colombia, Dominican Republic, Peru, Ecuador, and the Philippines. Transfers are processed through an online platform and mobile app, with funds delivered in minutes. The company emphasizes competitive exchange rates, customer support in English and Spanish (7:30 AM - 11:30 PM daily), and a 100% money-back guarantee on delivery.

Envios.com differentiates itself through speed (transfers in minutes rather than days), ease of use via digital channels, and personalized customer service. The website highlights real testimonials from users praising fast delivery and reliable service. The platform also offers mobile recharges as an ancillary service alongside remittances.

As a remittance provider, Envios.com operates in a competitive market with established players. While the company offers legitimate services with regulatory compliance, users should note that international transfer fees and final exchange rates impact the amount recipients receive. The business model relies on volume and exchange rate margins rather than high individual transfer fees.
pros: Transfers processed in minutes rather than days, with real-time status notifications
Competitive exchange rates prominently displayed ($1 USD = $17.61 MXP example on homepage)
100% money-back guarantee on delivery if transfer fails
Bilingual customer support available daily 7:30 AM - 11:30 PM (English and Spanish)
Coverage to 20+ countries including major Latin American destinations and Philippines
Mobile app available for on-the-go transfers
Regulated money transmitter with NMLS licensing and compliance documentation available
cons: Limited to international transfers only; cannot send domestic US checks or payments
Website does not transparently display transfer fees or final recipient amounts before account creation
Requires phone number and account creation to view specific pricing, limiting comparison shopping
No mention of fraud protection or dispute resolution process on main website
Exchange rates subject to change and vary by destination country and currency
best_for: Immigrants sending regular remittances to family in Latin America or Philippines
Users prioritizing speed over lowest possible fees for international transfers
Spanish-speaking customers comfortable with digital/mobile platforms
People sending money to multiple countries who want a single platform
diagnosis: Envios.com is best for immigrant populations and families regularly sending money to Latin America or the Philippines who value speed and ease of use over absolute lowest costs. The main caveat is that fees and final exchange rates are not transparent until you create an account and initiate a transfer, making upfront cost comparison difficult.
services: Account creation and online fund transfers
Customer support via phone (1-866-536-8467) and email (info@envios.com)
Mobile app for iOS and Android
